name: Harbor Provisions Co.
description: A seafood-forward catering company based on Cape Cod, specializing in coastal New England fare and farm-to-table seasonal menus. Perfect for waterfront weddings, clambakes, and relaxed celebrations with a nautical charm.

service_area.note: We serve all of Cape Cod, the Islands, and South Shore. Flat $250 travel fee for events beyond 40 miles. We do not travel to Boston or north of Route 2.

serviceware.eco_note: We love doing eco-friendly! Our clambake packages default to compostable serviceware. Available for all service styles at no extra charge.

bar_service.note: We can provide beer, wine, and non-alcoholic beverages. For full bar service, we recommend partnering with a dedicated bar vendor. We can coordinate.

sweeteners: Complimentary raw bar station for events over 150 guests
Free lobster upgrade on buffet packages booked before March
Locally sourced welcome drink for all guests included
Complimentary s'mores station for evening receptions

deposit_and_cancellation.note: For clambake packages, 50% deposit required due to advance sourcing.

highlights: guests still talk about the lobster

personality: Casual, coastal, and deeply connected to the local food scene. Harbor Provisions is passionate about sourcing from Cape Cod fishermen and local farms. They bring a laid-back energy and love creating menus that feel like a New England summer. Flexible and easygoing in negotiations.
